title: Sweet Crunchy Malaysian Almond Crumble
description: A fragrant, lightly sweet crumb topping with a hint of tang from pickled cucumber, perfect as a dessert or snack.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 180°C (350°F) and line a 9‑inch square baking pan with parchment paper.
In a large bowl, whisk together almond flour, coconut sugar, ground cardamom, ground cinnamon, sea salt, and lemon zest.
Add the softened butter to the dry mix and stir until the mixture resembles coarse crumbs.
Fold in the diced pickled cucumber and vanilla extract until evenly distributed.
In a separate bowl, whisk the egg whites until soft peaks form, then gently fold them into the crumb mixture.
Press the mixture firmly into the prepared pan, smoothing the surface with a spatula.
Bake for 20–25 minutes, or until the top is golden brown and the crumble feels firm to the touch.
Remove from the oven and let cool in the pan for 10 minutes before cutting into squares to serve.
